meta.title: Bolt Industrial Engineering Services
meta.description: Electrical and Mechanical Engineering Services across the UK. Quality workmanship with a Continuous Improvement approach.

hero.headline: Industrial Engineering Services
hero.subheadline:
Delivering quality electrical & mechanical engineering solutions across the UK
Project & Site Management Continuous Improvement

about.heading: About Bolt
about.intro: Bolt Industrial Engineering Services Limited was formed to supply Electrical and Mechanical Services to Industry.
about.description: We specialise in quality workmanship and adopt a Continuous Improvement approach to support the demands of our clients. Our Site Managers are responsible for the welfare and work quality of all personnel, ensuring works are carried out on schedule in line with time constraints.

services.heading: Our Services
services.intro: We supply labour fully qualified and experienced in leading teams of Engineers and delivering Projects on time and within budget.

items.title: Project & Site Management
items.description: Full project and site management across the UK for short or long-term contracts. CDM Project Management, risk assessments, and programme delivery.

items.title: Electrical Engineering
items.description: Comprehensive electrical engineering services including installation, maintenance, and commissioning for industrial facilities.

items.title: Mechanical Engineering
items.description: Expert mechanical engineering services covering installation, fabrication, pipework, and plant maintenance.

items.title: Health & Safety Management
items.description: SMSTS and SSSTS qualified managers ensuring full compliance with Health and Safety legislation on every project.

items.title: Labour Supply
items.description: Supplying skilled engineers, supervisors, and operatives. Interim Engineering Supervisor and Manager positions available.

items.title: Lean Manufacturing
items.description: Implementing lean manufacturing techniques and continuous improvement methodologies to optimise operational efficiency.

items.quote: We have been impressed with the response along with the quality of the staff provided. Excellent safety performance, quality trained staff, and an excellent standard of work.
items.author: Malcolm Brown

items.quote: Your input on the Morrison's, Lidl, and Muller Projects has been invaluable to us, and you have become a real key part of the team.
items.author: Dave

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.intro: Ready to discuss your next project? Contact us today.
contact.address: 4 Hawthorn Way, St. Ives, Cambridgeshire, PE27 3YP

blog.heading: News & Insights
blog.intro: Stay up to date with the latest from Bolt Industrial Engineering Services.

posts.title: Welcome to Our New Website
posts.author: Bolt Services
posts.excerpt: We're excited to launch our brand new website, designed to better showcase our engineering services and make it easier to get in touch.
posts.body:
We're excited to launch our brand new website, designed to better showcase our engineering services and make it easier for clients to get in touch.

The new site features a modern design, detailed information about all of our services, and a simple contact form so you can reach us quickly.

We'll be using this blog to share project updates, industry news, and insights from our team. Stay tuned for more!
